Source: Amazon Q Developer Docs
URL: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/amazonq/latest/qdeveloper-ug/what-is.html
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Amazon Q Developer Overview

## Key Features
- Generative AI-powered assistant for AWS applications
- Code chat, inline completions, net new code generation
- Security vulnerability scanning
- Code upgrades and improvements

## IDE Integrations
- Visual Studio Code, JetBrains, Visual Studio, Eclipse (preview)

## Enterprise & Governance
- Built on Amazon Bedrock
- Automated abuse detection
- IAM-based permission management
- Multi-channel deployment (Console, Mobile, Teams, Slack)
- Channel guardrails support

## Pricing
- Free tier available
- Amazon Q Developer Pro subscription
